text.title: ads-meta-creative Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ads-meta-creative as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Opening the primary text with the company name or product name.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The first line must be a hook that grabs the reader's attention. Company names convey no value to a cold audience; they are only useful after the hook has earned the reader's attention.

failure-mode.description: Running only one creative per ad set.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: With a single creative, there is nothing to learn from and no fallback when fatigue hits. Minimum 3-5 creatives per ad set enables testing and prevents account-wide fatigue cascades.

failure-mode.description: Meta's Standard Enhancements automatically rewrites copy and adds music to videos in 2024+ accounts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The creative variant your agent produced may not be the one served. If brand voice is critical, disable Standard Enhancements explicitly per ad creative. Agents must validate that disabled accounts stay disabled.

failure-mode.description: AI-generated images are increasingly detected and de-prioritized by Meta's systems.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Advantage+ creative downranks "synthetic" assets when it can identify them. Human-shot UGC and professional photography outperform AI-generated visuals in delivery priority.

failure-mode.description: Video creative without captions or with auto-generated captions that are unverified.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: 85% of users watch video on mute. Uncaptioned video is wasted spend. Agents rendering "audio-on by default" videos and skipping caption burn-in lose most of the audience.

failure-mode.description: LLM-generated copy has distinctive tells: em-dashes, "in today's fast-paced world", "leverage", "robust", "seamless", "elevate".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Trained readers (both humans and Meta's detection systems) flag this as AI-generated, reducing trust and engagement. Agents should lint output for these phrases and rewrite.

failure-mode.description: Agents generating 10 variants that repeat the same hook with minor word changes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Embedding-similarity checks before upload catch duplicates. Testing 10 variants that are actually 3 variants repeated fails to isolate variables and wastes budget.

failure-mode.description: Image models hallucinating text on images that gets read as gibberish.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents should render text overlays in code (PIL/CSS), not in the image generation prompt. Rendered text is legible; hallucinated text undermines trust.

failure-mode.description: Video models failing captions or rendering them in wrong aspect.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always re-caption with Whisper post-render and overlay programmatically. Do not trust the caption output from generation APIs.
